Harvest standardized L3 input tables from upstream producer backends

Source: R/harvest_l3_inputs.R
harvest_l3_inputs.Rd

Harvest standardized L3 input tables from upstream producer backends

Usage

harvest_l3_inputs(
  gpa,
  l3_backend,
  l1_model_names = NULL,
  l2_model_names = NULL,
  l3_model_names = NULL,
  lg = NULL
)

Arguments

gpa

a glm_pipeline_arguments object

l3_backend

target L3 backend specification or backend name

l1_model_names

optional character vector of L1 models to include

l2_model_names

optional character vector of L2 models to include

l3_model_names

optional character vector of L3 models to process

lg

optional logger

Value

a list of data.frames, one per L1/L2 contrast combination, for each L3 model
